activities.name: Hotel Check-in & Settle
activities.description: Arrive at The Hoxton Portland, check in and freshen up

activities.name: Powell's City of Books
activities.description: Explore the world's largest independent bookstore spanning an entire city block with color-coded rooms

activities.name: Dinner at Harlow
activities.description: Upscale vegan restaurant featuring organic, locally-sourced plant-based cuisine. Try the Harlow Bowl or the cashew mac and cheese

activities.name: Evening Stroll in Pearl District
activities.description: Walk through Portland's trendy Pearl District with art galleries and boutiques

activities.name: Breakfast at Prasad
activities.description: Organic vegan cafe with fresh juices, smoothie bowls, and plant-based breakfast options

activities.name: Portland Craft Brewery Tour
activities.description: Guided tour visiting 4 of Portland's best craft breweries including Deschutes, Rogue, and local favorites. Includes tastings and behind-the-scenes access. Transportation included.

activities.name: Explore Washington Park & Japanese Garden
activities.description: Visit the stunning Portland Japanese Garden, considered one of the most authentic outside Japan

activities.name: Dinner at Departure Restaurant + Lounge
activities.description: Rooftop restaurant with Asian-fusion cuisine and excellent vegan options including tofu dishes, vegetable curries, and creative plant-based plates

activities.name: Breakfast at Sweetpea Baking Co.
activities.description: 100% vegan bakery and cafe with incredible pastries, donuts, breakfast sandwiches, and coffee

activities.name: Saturday Market (if weekend) or Food Cart Pod Tour
activities.description: Explore Portland's famous food cart scene with many vegan options, or visit the Saturday Market for local crafts and food

activities.name: Visit Lan Su Chinese Garden
activities.description: Authentic Ming Dynasty-style garden in the heart of Portland's Chinatown, a peaceful urban oasis

activities.name: Coffee at Extracto Coffee Roasters
activities.description: Local coffee roaster with vegan pastries and plant-based milk options

activities.name: Farewell Dinner at Canteen
activities.description: Upscale vegan fine dining with seasonal tasting menus and creative plant-based dishes. Perfect finale to your Portland food tour

activities.name: Quick Breakfast & Hotel Checkout
activities.description: Grab coffee and a pastry near hotel before checkout

activities.name: Depart for PDX Airport
activities.description: Take MAX Light Rail or rideshare to airport for 1pm flight

plan.reasoning: This itinerary is designed for a solo traveler from New York to Portland for 3 nights (Sept 5-8, 2026) with a $1,500 budget. All restaurant recommendations have been adjusted to feature vegan-friendly or 100% vegan establishments including Harlow, Prasad, Sweetpea Baking Co., and Canteen. A comprehensive craft brewery tour has been added on Day 2, which is a must-do activity in Portland given its reputation as one of America's top beer cities. The itinerary also includes Powell's Books as requested. The total cost of $1,488 stays within the $1,500 budget, breaking down as: Flights $570, Hotel $495 (3 nights at $165/night at a well-located downtown hotel), Activities & Food $423. The schedule balances the traveler's interests in Portland's renowned food scene (with all vegan options), literary culture, craft beer, and iconic attractions like the Japanese Garden and Lan Su Chinese Garden.
plan.final_message_to_user:
I've created a complete 3-night Portland itinerary perfectly tailored to your vegan dietary needs and interests! 🌱🍺📚

**Highlights:**
✅ **All vegan dining** - Every restaurant has been carefully selected for excellent vegan options, including 100% vegan spots like Harlow, Sweetpea Baking Co., Prasad, and Canteen
✅ **Craft Brewery Tour** - Day 2 features a 4-hour guided tour of Portland's famous craft breweries with tastings
✅ **Powell's Books** - Afternoon visit on Day 1 to explore this iconic bookstore
✅ **Food scene exploration** - Food cart pods, vegan fine dining, and local cafes showcase Portland's incredible plant-based food culture
✅ **Budget-friendly** - Total cost of $1,488 stays within your $1,500 budget

Your trip includes round-trip JetBlue flights, 3 nights at The Hoxton Portland (great downtown location), the brewery tour, cultural attractions like the Japanese Garden and Lan Su Chinese Garden, and all meals at top vegan-friendly spots. Portland is one of the most vegan-friendly cities in the US, so you'll have an amazing culinary experience!

Safe travels! 🌲✈️
